channel.title: oSthing's blog
channel.description: Ciallo～(∠・ω< )⌒☆ — oSthing's blog. A terminal-driven personal site for notes on systems, design, and the things in between.

item.title: Hello, World
item.description: A first post to verify the blog pipeline works end-to-end — build, RSS, sitemap, terminal `blog` and `search` commands.
item.author: osthinggg@gmail.com

item.title: Building this terminal blog
item.description: How a minimal Astro site with xterm.js became my writing home — design notes, tradeoffs, and the small details that matter.
item.author: osthinggg@gmail.com

item.title: Notes on minimalist web design
item.description: What I learned from stripping a UI down to one screen, one font, and one accent color.
item.author: osthinggg@gmail.com
